transcript.text: Hey thanks for the last minute chat.
No problem.
So I wanted to give you an update and I didn't want to do it through email because it's rude but I have to give notice on the contract.
Okay.

You guys are awesome so there's really no it's more that like as an AI company we feel some pressure to like build these capabilities ourselves okay into every aspect of what we do like our founders when the first time I them I asked them a question and they were like hey you need to ask chat TPT that and then like so anyway just an example they want us using AI ourselves and developing that skill set everywhere and like we've laid really great foundations from an SEO content perspective but

The where I'm seeing the opportunities in the market as I get a little bit further in here is going to come more from partnerships, word of mouth, and obviously I'll keep growing traffic as much as I can as I build out our own capability, but we just don't need the level of that type of investment we're doing now.

And our budgets are, you know, coming under more scrutiny, we're anticipating that these tariffs are going to impact ad budgets in a big way, and it's not hitting us yet, but a lot of our agreements with customers still have us earning a percentage of their ad spend.
So, like, this is probably going to shrink our existing customer base revenue, which means the pressure is going to be on really efficient acquisition.
So anyway, I'm, you know, I just, like I said, I wanted to like, talk to you first before I just send over an email because I've been on the other side of that and I know it sucks.
Oh, thank you.
I, from my, from my previous agency experience, a lot of times like a customer might churn and I don't hear from them again.
So I appreciate you like taking the time to talk to me.
I mean, I, you know, I'm sad to hear that, but I understand with everything that's going on in the market that things are volatile and things change, especially in the startup.
They constantly change.
So definitely understand what's going on right now.
It fixes.
Yeah.
Thanks so much.
I kind of wish that I could just keep using all you all and, you know, like you said, things change lot.
So I really don't want to shut the door.
I want to stay in touch.
think what you guys are doing is super cool.
I love that you broke air ops and now.
I have to do everything via API call.
think that's awesome.
And I learned a lot from you guys, too.
be a stranger.
Keep in touch.
I want to send this note.
Again, I want to be sensitive to not just surprising everybody on Friday.
Who should I send the notice to?
OK, so it should definitely be Kyle.
Have you met Kyle?
I think I have.
don't remember.
We had one of the meetings.
I think he was in maybe our first meeting together.
Yeah, so I think it's Kyle.
And then he can just forward email anybody else that needs to be looped in.
But I'll give you his email right now.
Thank you.
And also heads up.
Jason knows what's his name, Marcel?
Yes, he does.
So Jason reached out to Marcel too, just to let him know that it's personal, no performance implications, just we have to watch our budgets a little more carefully.
Yeah, yeah, no, I get it.
Yeah, just how things go.
hope I'm the only person you hear this from.
Yeah, we have a lot of our clients are in different industries.
So we'll see how things go over the next couple of months.
Honestly, marketing has been so volatile over the past couple of years.
Like I got laid off from another agency after, you know, the downturn in like late 2022.
Oh my God, like that hit the agency, I was working at super hard and we were just, yeah, it was, and it was after a period of like insane growth in 2021.
Just it was overnight really that like kids were getting cut and yeah But and that was even like before AI so Getting a lot less like content for the same price pretty much.
Yeah We have a 30-day period to finish working together, right?
I'm honestly don't I think Kyle is probably the best person to confirm but I have your contract somewhere in notion But it's best to confirm that with him.
I'll confirm with Kyle.

I think we do for next week Not urgent at all, but when we talk next week I want to just make sure like we have a loose plan and that I'm giving you enough to work with to Get us through whatever that is period is and That we're being responsive enough and we don't have to Try to like have a backlog of stuff to do after that, you know Yeah, yeah, and one thing that we can do is like

I think we were last meeting, we were talking about doing like a couple of statistics articles, so we can prioritize that for like next week, like sent you up for backlinks in like the next couple of months.
Cool.
Okay.
right.
Cool.
All right.
Thanks, Ada.
I'm going to send a note to Kyle and an LCCU.
And I hope you have an weekend.
All right.
Next week.
Thank you.
Have a great weekend.
See you.
See you.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Colin Campbell from Pixis informs growthx.ai of contract termination and discusses transition details.](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pixis is ending their contract with growthx.ai due to internal AI development priorities and budget scrutiny](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [30-day notice period (to be confirmed) for wrapping up ongoing work](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Relationship remains positive; Colin expresses appreciation and desire to keep in touch](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Market volatility and AI advancements are impacting marketing agency relationships broadly](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

## Topics

### Contract Termination Rationale

  - [Pixis feels pressure to develop in-house AI capabilities for all aspects of their business](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Founders encourage use of AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT) for internal queries](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [SEO/content foundations are solid, but future growth opportunities lie in partnerships and word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Anticipated tariffs may impact ad budgets, affecting Pixis' revenue (% of customer ad spend)](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Focus shifting to efficient acquisition due to potential shrinkage in existing customer base revenue](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

### Transition Process

  - [Colin to send official notice to Kyle (growthx.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [30-day work period to be confirmed with Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Plan to discuss next week: ensuring smooth workflow and responsiveness during notice period](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Prioritizing statistics articles for backlink potential in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Market Context

  - [Marketing industry volatility noted (e.g., Aida's previous layoff experience in late 2022)](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [AI advancements allowing "a lot less content for the same price"](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Pixis anticipating market changes, proactively adjusting strategies and budgets](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

### Relationship Maintenance

  - [Colin emphasized personal approach (call vs. email) to deliver news](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Expressed appreciation for growthx.ai's work and innovations (e.g., API-based operations)](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Desire to keep communication open for potential future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Colin to send official notice email to Kyle at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Confirm exact duration of notice period (assumed 30 days) with Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Schedule discussion next week to plan work during the notice period](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Prioritize creation of statistics articles for backlink potential](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Jason (Pixis) to inform Marcel (growthx.ai) about the contract end, emphasizing it's not performance-related](https://fathom.video/share/rWBa29PBxjyPmqb52KP1tHe4S6bEFZa_?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

action_items.description: Email Kyle contract termination notice; cc Jason
Prep loose plan for remaining work period; discuss w/ Aida next week
Prioritize statistics articles for next week; prep for backlinks
